signin_sub: Pick up where you left off.
signup_sub: Your progress is saved and follows you to any device.
pass_hint: At least 8 characters, with a letter and a digit.
forgot_sub: We will send you a link to set a new one.
forgot_sent_1: We sent a password reset link to
forgot_sent_2: If you cannot see it, check your spam folder. The link is valid for one hour.
reset_sub: Choose a password you do not use anywhere else.
reset_done_sub: Your password has been changed. Redirecting…
reset_invalid_sub: It has expired or was already used. Request a new one.
verify_banner: Confirm your email so you do not lose your progress.
progress_signin_hint: so you do not lose your progress when you switch devices.
v_email_invalid: That email does not look valid.
v_pass_short: The password must be at least 8 characters.
v_pass_letter: The password must contain a letter.
v_pass_digit: The password must contain a digit.
v_repeat_mismatch: The two passwords do not match.
err_taken: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead.
err_not_confirmed: Confirm your email — we sent you a link.
err_too_many: Too many attempts. Wait a moment.
err_bad_email: That email does not look valid.
err_locked: Too many failed attempts. Wait, or reset your password.
